privileged_info_summary: Task creates a synthetic corporate network topology diagram with 23 devices (not 21 as description claims) across 6 zones. The inventory file is auto-generated with fictional data using RFC 1918 private addresses (10.x.x.x) and RFC 5737 TEST-NET-3 (203.0.113.x). Devices include routers, switches, firewalls, servers, and wireless equipment organized into zones: WAN/Edge, DMZ, Core/Distribution, Server Farm, Wireless, and Management. Zone names in inventory differ from what verifier expects (e.g., 'Server Farm' vs 'Server'). Network has 24 directed connections between devices. Draw.io version 26.0.9 (released Jan 27, 2026) is specified. Verifier uses XML parsing to detect devices and zones via substring matching in diagram text, with thresholds of 15+ devices, 12+ edges, and 4+ zones for passing.
